title: alsine glabra
intro: Alsine glabra, also known as Mountain avens, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Alsine glabra include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Alsine glabra include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
